perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with pigtails wearing a blue tracksuit runs excitedly down a brightly lit white hallway holding a plate of Japanese curry. (2) The scene cuts to a well-known Japanese male actor sitting in a living room, taking a bite of curry from a spoon and looking incredibly satisfied, leaning his head back in delight. (3) The woman is shown laughing hysterically and covering her face. (4) Large stylized Japanese text appears over the man as he speaks. (5) The woman appears in a white lace dress, acting shy and holding her hands up to her face as if she is a bride. (6) The video loops back to her running with the plate.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat, and playful music starts with the sound of rapid footsteps. (2) A woman's excited giggle is heard followed by a man's deep, resonant voice saying "Umai" (Delicious). (3) A sound effect of a cheering crowd and laughter plays loudly. (4) The music transitions into a more grand, romantic orchestral swell as the man says "Kekkon shite kure" (Marry me). (5) The woman lets out a high-pitched, ecstatic squeal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "結婚してくれ" (Marry me) - Dramatic/Romantic tone. (2) Functional Text: "（嫁給我吧）" (Marry me) - Literal Chinese translation. (3) Decorative Text: "我準備好了" (I'm ready) - Enthusiastic tone with heart-eye emoji. (4) Hook Text: "這笑容..." (This smile...) - Admiring tone. (5) Decorative Text: "緯嘉看過嗎" (Has Weijia seen this?) - Questioning/Playful tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Running with food) -> Reaction (Actor eating) -> Fantasy (Proposal) -> Outro (Reaction)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator running and reacting, 1 male actor appearing in inserted TV/film clips.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair in pigtails, wearing a blue zip-up hoodie and matching cargo-style sweatpants, later changing into a white lace blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern white hallway with light wood doors and marble-patterned flooring; a living room with a light beige sofa and heavy grey curtains.

vocal_qualities.tone: Excited, high-pitched, and humorous (female); Deep and romantic (male)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous 'fan-girl' fantasy scenario where the creator's cooking is so good it prompts a proposal from a famous Japanese actor, satirizing common romantic drama tropes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product brand is prominently featured as the focus of a promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of Japanese-style variety show editing with large color-coded text.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the viewer recognizing the Japanese actor (Takeru Satoh) to understand the comedic value of the 'proposal' sequence.
